hero.title: Digital systems with real impact.
hero.description: Developer and IT Officer working on e-governance, API architecture, and practical automation for public and private organizations.

about.title: Secret About Me
paragraphs: I convert manual workflows into clean digital systems. My main strengths are backend delivery, API design, and practical execution for local government and organizational teams.
I currently serve as Information Technology Officer at Chulachuli Rural Municipality and deliver software services to clients in Nepal and abroad.

education.subtitle: Scroll horizontally through the timeline. Get information about my each milestone.

items.message: Completed lower secondary level and moved to Damak for class 9 and 10.

items.message: Completed SEE level with Math and science interest.

items.title: +2 completed, Nepal Examination Board (NEB)
items.message: Completed +2 level and advanced toward Science as a main track.

items.title: Bachelor Started
items.message: Started Bachelor and advanced toward computing track.

items.message: Focused on practical computing skills, databases, and systems.

items.title: Applied learning with professional work

items.title: Bachelor Completed
items.message: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Information Technology (B. Sc. CSIT), affiliated to T.U. is the course composition of 4 years IT and computer courses.

items.title: Jan 2022 | Municipal Digital Profile
items.description: Built structured digital profiles for rural municipality operations.

items.title: Aug 2022 | Inventory System
items.description: Django-based stock and supplier management with process control.

items.description: REST APIs for municipal services and inter-department data flow.

items.title: Nov 2023 | Flutter App Integration
items.description: Cross-platform client integrated with backend for field usability.

items.description: Django, REST API, Flutter, PostgreSQL, and automation workflows.

items.title: 2024 | IT Officer + International Delivery
items.description: Government IT leadership plus services for Nepal, Denmark, and India.
